articles.description: Microsoft shut down dozens of GitHub code repositories for Azure and AI coding tools after a reported hack.

articles.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
articles.description: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event kicked off this morning at 10 a.m. PT at Apple Park, starting a week full of expected announcements around Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more, along with developer events and demos. This year’s event is particularly notable for a couple things. It marks CEO Tim Cook’s last with the company, […]
articles.summary: WWDC 2026 will feature announcements on Siri AI enhancements and iOS 27 along with Apple Intelligence developments.
points: Tim Cook's final WWDC event as CEO
Anticipated major updates to the Siri intelligent personal assistant
Introduction of iOS 27, expected improvements in device performance and user experience
articles.insight: The upcoming announcements at Apple's final WWDC under Tim Cook may signal strategic changes for future CEOs as they strive to maintain the brand's reputation for innovation.

articles.title: Pentagon says Alibaba, Baidu, BYD and Unitree support China’s military
articles.description: The Trump administration released the updated version of the list four months ago and then quickly pulled it without explaining why
articles.summary: The Pentagon has confirmed that major Chinese companies including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc., BYD Company Limited (BYD), and Unitree Robotics support China's military by providing technology or equipment directly to the People'inflarmed forces. The Trump administration previously released a similar list but quickly retracted it without clarifying their reasons.
points: Pentagon announces major Chinese tech companies supplying military
Trump admin lists include Alibaba, Baidu, BYD and Unitree Robotics as supporters of China's armed forces by providing equipment or technology directly to the People’s Liberation Army (PLA)
The Pentagon update follows similar disclosures from U.S., European Union officials
articles.insight: This news could significantly affect international relations and the global tech industry, as it highlights potential national security risks in technology partnerships with Chinese firms.

articles.title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
articles.description: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.
articles.summary: Apple has integrated advanced artificial intelligence into its iPhone applications including Safari, Shortcuts, and Password Manager.
points: The new AI features in Apple's apps will complete sentences inputted by users for quicker text replies.
Photos can now be annotated automatically using image recognition to identify people and objects without manual tagging.
Apple is enhancing the Shortcuts app with AI capabilities, allowing it to learn from user habits over time.
articles.insight: The integration of AI into Apple'su apps could significantly streamline everyday tasks for iPhone users and set a new standard in personalized digital assistance within the industry.

articles.title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
articles.description: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.
articles.summary: Apple introduces its new Shortcuts app with enhanced Artificial Intelligence capabilities that enable users to create custom AI-powered workflows through descriptive prompts.
points: Shortcuts now includes an upgrade focusing on artificial intelligence (AI).
With the update, Apple's Shortcuts app allows users to craft their own automated tasks and routines using natural language descriptions for workflow creation.
This feature represents a significant shift towards integrating AI into everyday productivity tools.
articles.insight: The integration of AI within Apple's Shortcuts app signifies an increasing trend in technology to streamline daily tasks and work processes, offering more intuitive user experiences across different industries.

articles.title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
articles.description: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.
articles.summary: The core content of the article highlights Apple unveiling an improved version of its Image Playground - their AI image generator tool.
points: Apple has updated its Artificial Intelligence-driven visual platform, known as 'Image Playground.'
This update is aimed at making the tool more competitive within the industry and enhancing user experience with improved capabilities.
Experts are anticipating that this upgrade will further solidify Apple's position in AI creative tools.
articles.insight: The refurbished Image Playground suggests a strategic move by Apple to maintain its dominance and possibly attract new users interested in harnessing the capabilities of advanced generative design within their products, thus driving innovation forward.

articles.title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
articles.description: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.
articles.summary: Apple's Photos app is introducing a 'Reframe' AI feature that allows users to change the perspective of their photos with ease.
points: Introduces spatial ReFrame for adjusting photo perspectthood using Apple's newest AI-enhanced editing tools in iOS and iPadOS devices,
Users can quickly transform a portrait by shifting the subject to appear more dynamic or even turn landscape photos into portraits.
Reframe uses machine learning for realistic photo retouching without needing professional skills.
articles.insight: This update reflects Apple's commitment to making advanced technology accessible, enhancing user creativity and control over digital content. It also indicates a trend where AI becomes an integral part of everyday photography tools beyond specialized software.

articles.title: Apple gives Siri its own dedicated app
articles.description: Siri is finally getting its own app.
articles.summary: Apple has announced the development of a standalone application for Siri to enhance user interaction and accessibility beyond iOS devices.
points: The dedicated Siri app allows users on iPhones with Face ID or older models without Apple Pay, as well as those using third-party apps like AirTag that track location via Bluetooth LE technology.
articles.insight: This decision by Apple indicates an expansion of their ecosystem to include standalone Siri applications for various platforms and devices beyond just iPhone. It could potentially drive further innovations in AI voice assistants across the tech industry.

articles.title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature
articles.description: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.
articles.summary: Apple has introduced a new Camera feature for iPhones that allows users to easily split restaurant bills by integrating with the Apple Cash payment system.
points: The Siri-enhanced camera feature can identify items ordered in photos taken at restaurants and facilitate tab splitting using preloaded balance on iPhone cards.
Sebastien Marineau-Mes, VP of Software for Apple, announced the new technology as part of a larger effort to improve digital payment methods within mobile devices.
To use this feature effectively, users must ensure their camera lenses are clean and positioned correctly during an image capture.
articles.insight: This development is likely to streamline restaurant payments for iPhone users by simplifying the process of identifying expenses from a shared meal. The integration with Apple Cash suggests that this feature could be part of broader changes in payment methods across mobile devices, potentially impacting how consumers manage dining out costs.

articles.title: Apple puts parents back in control of kids’ iPhone use
articles.description: Apple is putting control back into the hands of parents with more granular screen time features.
articles.summary: Apple has introduced new, detailed controls for managing childrens' iPhone usage through Family Sharing and Screen Time.
points: Parents can now set specific time limits on different types of apps: games/entertainment (e.g., TikTok), social media interactions like Instagram Stories, educational resources such as Khan Academy videos, etc.
Parental control options include setting daily or weekly time restrictions for kids' phone use and the ability to enforce them effectively starting August 25th.
articles.insight: These updates signify Apple’s effort in addressing growing concerns over children'deexposureto potentially harmful online content, by providing parents with more power to monitor their kids' digital activities and ensure a safe tech environment for the younger generation.

articles.title: Apple’s Health app can now tell you if you’re in perimenopause
articles.description: Cycle tracker will now notify women when their cycle patterns are suggestive of perimenopause.
articles.summary: Apple has updated its Health app to include notifications about potential signs of perimenopause in women'energetic cycles.
points: The Apple Health app now tracks cycle patterns and notifies users when they suggest perimenopause
Perimenopausal changes often begin between the ages of 40-58, with symptoms like irregular periods becoming more common as women age into their mid-life years.
Apple's update reflects an increased awareness and interest in personal health technology to monitor transitions such as perimenopause.
articles.insight: The Apple Health app enhancement shows the expanding role of consumer tech companies in monitoring long-term health changes, which could potentially improve early detection for conditions like menopause. This may influence future developments aimed at personalized medicine and age-related wellness tracking.

articles.title: Apple’s long-awaited AI Siri overhaul is finally here
articles.description: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.
articles.summary: Apple has unveiled its updated Siri with enhanced artificial intelligence capabilities, transforming it into a friendlier and more intelligent assistant.
points: Siri AI is an overhauled voice-controlled personal assistant from Apple designed to provide companionship along with functionality.
The new system uses advanced machine learning algorithms for better understanding natural language, making Siri responses feel more human and less robotic.
Apple emphasizes improved privacy controls in the updated AI Siri.
articles.insight: With Apple's latest overhaul of Siri as an intelligent assistant that can converse with users like a friend, there is potential for significant advancement and broader acceptance of conversational agents within everyday tech applications. However, the success will largely depend on continuous learning algorithms to adapt to diverse user needs.

articles.title: How to apply to Startup Battlefield 2026, what you need ahead of today’s June 8 deadline
articles.description: Startup Battlefield applications are due tomorrow, so now's the time to put the finishing touches on your submission!
articles.summary: The article provides essential information about applying for Startup Battlefield 2nerd-out event happening in August of 2026, including a deadline and what applicants need to prepare.
points: Startup Battlefield applications open on June 7th with the submission due by midnight EST. The winners will be announced at the Startup Battlefest event from August 18-20 in Minneapolis, MN.
Applicants must create a profile and submit an application through EventBrite within two weeks before their desired start date for consideration.

The article emphasizes that this is not just about applying to the event but also being invited. The author stresses on understanding what makes up Startup Battlefield, which includes networking with investors.
articles.insight: This news underscores the importance of planning and preparation in IT/technology competitions like Startup Battlefield as they can provide significant opportunities for exposure and growth within the industry. The event's focus on a blend of skill, networking, and presentation skills suggests that success is not only about having an innovative product but also effectively communicating it.

articles.title: NotebookLM’s new update will help you build source repository from chat
articles.description: Google is making Gemini 3.5 the default model in NotebookLM
articles.summary: The latest news reveals that Google has made their new AI-powered notebooks (NotebookLM) with the Gemini 3.5 language models as default for creating source repositories from chats.
points: Google introduces NotebookLM powered by advanced language model, Gemini 3.5
The update allows direct creation of documents or software directly through conversations with the AI assistant on notebook devices
This integration signifies a blend between human-computer interactions and code generation
articles.insight: With NotebookLM' extralinguistic capabilities now integrated into everyday computing, this represents an evolution of our interaction mechanisms with technology. It suggests that future developments might further simplify the process by which humans create digital content.

articles.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
articles.description: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.
articles.summary: Amazon has introduced a feature in the Shopping app that enables users to design custom merchandise using Alexa AI for various products.
points: The new Amazon Feature allows creating personalized designs with voice commands through Alexa
Available items include T-shirts, hoodies and tumblers which can be printed from the app
Requires a WiFi connection for designing and printing features to function
articles.insight: This feature represents Amazon'nergizing convenience in merchandise customization while promoting brand loyalty, potentially impactful on e-commerce.

articles.title: WhatsApp says it caught new spyware attacks linked to NSO Group in violation of court order
articles.description: The messaging giant announced that it disrupted a phishing campaign targeting its users with NSO’s spyware.
articles.summary: WhatsApp has identified and interrupted a sophisticated attack using the Pegasus spyware developed by Israel's NSO Group on its platform in violation of legal restrictions.
points: WhatsApp caught new phishing campaign targeting users with NSO’s Pegasus spyware
Campaign linked to the illegal sale or distribution of powerful surveillance tools like Pegasus software by non-state actors such as Hackers, Terrorists and Spies. (This is a known risk)
Disruption led WhatsApp's users in India targeted
articles.insight: The disruption of these attacks underlines the ongoing battle between privacy advocates striving to protect user data, and malicious entities attempting unauthorized surveillance. The case also highlights the need for greater international cooperation in monitoring and preventing cyber-attacks.

articles.title: WWDC 2026: What to expect, from Siri’s highly anticipated revamp to Apple Intelligence and iOS 27
articles.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.
articles.summary: The Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) 2026 will showcase major updates from Apple including a revamp of Siri and the introduction of new features like Apple Intelligence.
points: Siri is set to receive significant improvements, enhancing user interaction with personal assistant technology.
Apple Intelligence represents an expansion into AI-driven analytics for businesses across various industries.
The unveiling of iOS 27 marks the latest evolution in Apple's mobile operating system.
articles.insight: These advancements indicate a push by Apple towards integrating more intuitive AI technologies, which could set new industry standards and raise expectations for smart assistant capabilities going forward.

articles.title: Sam Bankman-Fried applies for a pardon from Trump
articles.description: The FTX co-founder is serving a 25-year sentence, doled out in 2024.
articles.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried has applied for clemency from President Trump after being sentenced to a substantial prison term related to FTX.
points: - Sam Bankman-Fried co-founded the cryptocurrency exchange FTX and was involved in its downfall due to allegations of fraudulent activities.

- He is serving a 25-year sentence, handed down after his sentencing hearing which occurred on January 17th when President Trump was still in office. The clemency process began during Trump's term and continued into the Biden administration without resolution as of early February.
- Bankman-Fried has asked for a full pardon or commutation, arguing that he is not guilty of any criminal wrongdoing.
articles.insight: Bankman-Fried' endorsement could potentially influence public perception and the wider conversation around cryptocurrency regulation due to his prominent status in this emerging field. However, as investigations continue regarding FTX operations, it remains unclear whether such clemency will be granted.

articles.title: Eventbrite and Vimeo owner Bending Spoons files to go public
articles.description: Bending Spoons say its app caters to a user base of over 500 million monthly active users.
articles.summary: Eventbrite and Vimeo owner Bending Spoons is going public after securing $275 million in funding from SoftBank's Horizons initiative. The company claims to serve over half a billion monthly active users with its event planning app.
points: Eventbrite and Vimeo owner Bending Spoons is going public after securing $275 million in funding from SoftBank'CTC initiative
The company claims to serve over half a billion monthly active users with its event planning app
Bezos invested early on, leading the way for Bending Spoons and raising industry interest
articles.insight: With Bezos's backing from an earlier investment phase, this move by Eventbrite and Vimeo owner Bending Spoons signifies strong confidence in event-based startups within the IT/technology sector. As they go public with significant funding secured through SoftBank’s Horizons initiative, it highlights the growing trend of tech companies raising substantial capital to scale their operations and user base.

articles.title: Massachusetts votes to pass new privacy rights bill that bans sale of precise location data
articles.description: The bill is expected to blanket-ban companies and startups from selling people's precise location data across the state.
articles.summary: Massachusetts has passed a new privacy rights bill that prohibits the sale of individuals' exact location information within the state.
points: The Massachusetts General Court voted in favor of HB 860, known as An Act to Protect Personal Data Security and Privacy (a.kinflighty referredto as Digital Shield).
Under this law companies can no longer sell precise location data.
Companies found guilty could face fines up to $1 million or risk their business license.
articles.insight: The bill sets a precedent for other states in the US, highlighting growing concerns about digital privacy and setting new standards that technology companies must consider when handling user data within Massachusetts. It signifies an increasing emphasis on protecting personal information across various industries affected by technological advancements.

articles.title: Uber, Wayve and Waymo are headed towards a robotaxi showdown in London
articles.description: Uber customers in the UK can now join an interest list to increase their chances of being matched with a Wayve robotaxi.
articles.summary: UK Uber users have joined lists for potential matches with autonomous taxis from companies including Wayve and Waymo in London.
points: -Uber customers can now join interest list to be matched with a robotaxi
-Wayve, founded by former Tesla engineers using real-world data to improve driving algorithms is one of the contenders for autonomous taxi service in London
-Waymo'in an ongoing trial and Uber continues testing fully driverless vehicles as part of their expansion strategy
articles.insight: The emergence of multiple players competing to provide robotaxi services indicates a significant move towards the commercialization of autonomous vehicle technology within public transportation, which could potentially transform urban mobility in major cities.

articles.title: 펜타시큐리티, ‘클라우드브릭 마스크 API’ 출시... 커뮤니티 맞춤형 비식별화 지원
articles.description: 복잡한 인공지능 모델 구축 없이 간편 연동만으로 영상·이미지 속 얼굴·번호판 블러 처리호출 통계 보고서 제공해 관리자 실시간 모니터링 및 데이터 기반 서비스 운영 적극 지원[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 펜타시큐리티가 온라인 플랫폼의 가장 큰 불안 요소인 개인정보 노출 리스크를 원천 차단하는 솔루션을 선보였다. 이용자가 이미지를 업로드하면 실시간으로 비식별화해 관
articles.summary: 펜타시큐리티는 개인정보 노출을 위한 솔루션을 제공해서 사용자가 이미지를 업로드하면 작동
points: 펜타시큐리티의 고급 컴러바 블랙커에서 개인정보 이미지 비식별화 지원
인기로 부여받은 클라우드브릭(CloudBio)를 이용한 API 제공
커뮤니티맞춤형 서비스를 제공해 모니터링 및 관리에 추가 지원
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 개인정보 비식별화를 위한 새로운 기술을 소개한다.

articles.title: 지란지교시큐리티, 한일 보안 동맹 구축 “일본 엔드포인트 시장 정조준”

articles.title: VIGI, 25배 광학 줌 PTZ 스피드 돔 ‘InSight PTZ5425’ 국내 정식 출시
articles.description: 최대 2.6㎞ 탐지와 자동 추적, 풀 컬러 야간 영상 지원NDAA 준수와 ONVIF 호환으로 중대형 실외 시설 공략 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 영상보안 브랜드 VIGI는 AI 기능을 탑재한 프리미엄 CCTV 라인업 ‘InSight 시리즈’를 통해 지능형 영상보안 시장 공략을 강화하고 있다.InSight 시리즈는 사람·차량 분석, 오탐 감소, 야간 식별력

articles.title: [배종찬의 보안 빅데이터] ‘AI 보안 동맹’, 젠슨 황이 네이버와 손잡는 까닭
articles.description: 한국을 단순한 부품 공급처가 아닌 미래 AI 생태계의 공동 주역으로 낙점했기 때문[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 엔비디아(Nvidia)의 젠슨 황 최고경영자(CEO)가 다시 한국을 찾았다. 지난 가을 화제를 모았던 ‘깐부치킨 회동’에 이어, 이번에는 서울 홍대입구 인근의 삼겹살집에서 최태원 SK그룹 회장, 구광모 LG그룹 회장, 이해진 네이버 의
articles.summary: 젠슨 황이가 한국을 재전탈하여, 기술과 보안에 중요한 논의를 시작한다.
points: - Nvidia 기술자인 젠슨 황이가 서울에 오썽니다
- 이런 것들을 통해 불공정한 기술시대를 이어올 수 discussed
- Nvidia의 AI로부인이 이해를 풋니다
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업계에서의 공동체가 중요한 문제점을 포함하여 AI로부인이 정보운전에 참여하고자 하는 불안전한 시대를 의미합니다.

articles.title: 다후아테크놀로지, AI 기반 저조도 영상 솔루션 ‘WizColor Pro X’ 선보여
articles.description: 센서·렌즈·AI 영상처리 기술 통합해 야간 영상 품질 향상F0.8 초대구경 렌즈와 4㎛ 대형 픽셀 센서 적용[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 글로벌 영상보안 기업 다후아테크놀로지(한국지사장 여심일)가 저조도 환경에서 컬러 영상 품질을 한층 강화한 ‘WizColor Pro X’를 공개했다. WizColor Pro X는 글로벌 제품명 WizColor 2.0을 기반으로
articles.summary: 다후아테크는 글로벌 WizColor Pro X, AI를 사용하여 영상 손실을 최소화한다.
points: WizColor Pro X는 글로벌 WizColor 2.0의 기본 작성자로, AI를 활용하여 4㎛ 대형 렌즈와 센서·렌즈·AI를 결합한 시스텬이다.
4㎛, 2㎛으로 제공되는 AI 기반 컬러 영상 처리는 정확도 또한 향상
이러한 렌즈와 센서·렌즈·AI를 통해 영상 품질을 더욱 강화하여, 액션영상 제작에 도움이다.
articles.insight: 위의 WizColor Pro X는 IT/기술 업계가 영상 품질 개선을 위해 핵심으로 하고 있다.

articles.title: 티빙 2차 공지, 사칭 피싱 사기 주의보... “개인정보·금전 요구 절대 없다”

articles.title: [PIS FAIR 2026 미리보기] 엘세븐시큐리티, AI 기반 ‘이미지 마스킹’으로 보안 사각지대 해소
articles.description: 지능형 이미지 스캔·마스킹 솔루션 공개... 금융권 10곳 이상 PoC 통과딥러닝 기반 OCR로 신분증·계좌번호·서명 등 비정형 데이터까지 전수 조사금융권 최다 레퍼런스 바탕으로 핀테크·제2금융권까지 시장 지배력 확대[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 엘세븐시큐리티가 ‘PIS FAIR 2026’에 참가해 차세대 AI 보안 솔루션을 공개한다. 최근 공공기관뿐만 아니라
articles.summary: 지능형 이미지 스캔·마스킹 기법을 사용하여 금융권 등 비정형 데이터에 대한 안전 보호솔루션을 PIS FAIR 2026에서 공개하였다.
points: PIS FAIR 2026에서는 AI를 이용해서 금융권 정보 등의 비정형 데이터를 마스킹하도록 조직화 시스템을 공개한다.
연구점에서는 인기있는 인저분산 확장성(Non-uniform Expansion)의 병목점, DDoS 공격, 전반적인 이미지 스캔과 비슷한 위기인식을 통해 보안 악용 질시가 진짜로 모니터Risk를 고나내게 확대되어 먼저 방어솔루션을 개발한다.
공개한 AI보안 시스템은 PoC에서는 금융권 10곡이상의 사각지대에서 OCR로 신분증·계좌번호·서명 등을 이미지로 인식하여 직접 보안 방안을 테스트한다.
articles.insight: 비정형 데이터에 대한 위기인식과 AI를 사용하여 우리나라의 금융권 시장을 보호해내는 방안은 지속적으로 고려해야 한다. PIS FAIR 2026의 AI보안 시스템이라면 우리나라의 금융권 시장에서도 마스킹 기능을 확보하는 방안을 고안해주세요.

articles.title: [Global Security TOP 100] 전명진 아마노코리아 대표이사 “주차관제 넘어 공간 플랫폼으로”
articles.description: AI·무인화 기반 플랫폼 기업 전환 가속전국 1만4000여개 운영 현장과 26개 서비스 거점 기반 경쟁력 강조AI 기반 전기차 화재 진압 토탈 솔루션 연내 상용화 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 1996년 설립 이후 대한민국 주차관제 산업을 이끌어온 아마노코리아가 AI와 무인화 기술을 기반으로 대대적인 체질 개선에 나서고 있다. 전국 1만4000여개 운영 현장
articles.summary: 전망의 기사는 대한민국의 주차관제 산업이 AI와 무인화 기술로 개선되어 여성 1만4000여개 운영 현장에서 경쟁력을 통합으로 강화하고 있다.
points: 대한민국의 주차관제 산업이 AI와 기술로 개선되어 경쟁할 수 있는 체인으로 강화
여성이 기술화 가진 1만4000여개 운영 현장에서 경쟁력을 통합으로 강화하고 있다.
AI,인스페이스 기술로 전문적인 플랫폼 제조체질을 촉진시키고 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 재미성 기술화 모델은 IT/기술 업체에서 경쟁적 장려리가지는 기회를 보장

articles.title: KISA, 음성스팸 차단 정조준... 유선·인터넷전화 사업자 방어망 넓힌다
articles.description: 스팸문자 91% 급감 속 음성스팸 873만건으로 폭증하는 풍선효과 선제 타개정보통신망법 기반 사업자 의무사항 안내 및 신고량 대국민 공개 전격 예고[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)은 유선 및 인터넷전화(VoIP) 사업자를 대상으로 불법스팸 대응 역량 강화를 위한 사업자 설명회를 11일 서울 세텍에서 개최한다고 9일 밝혔다.이번 행사는 3월

articles.title: 라온시큐어, FIDO 글로벌 인증 컨퍼런스서 에이전틱 AI 보안 전략 제시
articles.description: 파이도 얼라이언스 주최 ‘어센티케이트 APAC 2026’ 참가해 빅테크와 기술 나란히안면·지문 생체인증 및 이상 행위 탐지 기능 결합한 차세대 ‘원패스’ 현장 시연[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 라온시큐어는 지난 2일 싱가포르에서 개최된 국제 디지털 인증 컨퍼런스 ‘어센티케이트 APAC 2026’에 참가해 AI 환경에 최적화된 다중인증(MFA) 플랫폼 ‘원패스’(
articles.summary: 발행한 '어센티케이트 APAC 2026'에서 AI를 환경에 확장하여 다중인증을 줍니다.
points: 이 회사는 많은 기기들과 유대인자동 인증(FIDO)를 기반으로 제공합니다.
라온시큐어의 '원패스'는 AI를 이용한 강화가 가능합니다.
대근로기재에서 인증과 안전성을 보장할 수 있으리라고 생각합니다.
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 AI의 영향을 인증에 미치게 강제하고 안전성을 유지하는 방법에 대해서 소개하고 있습니다.

articles.title: MS 깃허브 저장소 73곳 감염... ‘미아스마’ 웜 공급망 공격 비상
articles.description: 미아스마 웜, MS가 관리하는 깃허브 저장소 73곳 연쇄 감염개발자 개인 접근 토큰(PAT)과 인증 키 탈취해 침투[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 전염성이 강한 미아스마(Miasma) 웜 악성코드가 마이크로소프트(MS)가 관리하는 핵심 깃허브(GitHub) 소스코드 저장소 73곳을 연쇄적으로 공격했다.이번 사건은 개발자 인증 자격을 탈취해 정상 프로그램을 오염시킨
articles.summary: MS GitHub 소스코드 73곳에서 Miasma 웜 공격: PAT과 인증 키 탈취
points: 개발자 인증 자격을 탈취한 Miasma 웜이 73개의 MS GitHub 소스코드 깃허브를 연쇄적으로 공격한다.
이러한 공격은 정상 프로그램의 기능을 제대로 유지하지 못하고, 보안성을 변동시켜 준비했다.
이러한 공격은 MS GitHub 소스코드 73곳에서 연기가 일어난 사건이다.
articles.insight: Miasma 웜의 이전 보호업산성과 공격 폭력은 IT 엔진에 대한 우려와 방어가 필요하다.

articles.title: 서울시설공단, 170만건 데이터 기반 도로관리 핵심기술 특허 출원 “교량 노후화 예측한다”
articles.description: 올림픽대로 등 서울시 전체 자동차전용도로 12개 노선·164개 시설물로 시스템 전면 확장디지털 트윈 연계·AI 기술 도입 추진으로 노후 시설물 안전관리의 새로운 표준 정립[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 서울시설공단(이사장 한국영)이 서울 도로관리의 안전 증진을 위해 구축한 ‘데이터 기반 도로관리 시스템’의 핵심기술의 특허출원을 완료했다고 5일 밝혔다.공단은 준공
articles.summary: 서울시 줄여진 게이트로 도로 협업에 기여한 '데이터 기반 도로관리 시스템'의 핵심기술을 얻으며 공단은 이를 완전히 청구한다.
points: 서울시설공단은 준공 '데이터 기반 도로관리 시스템'의 추진에 자세히 완전풀한 특허를 제출
이전에는 AI 기술을 알고리즘으로 도로 관리의 노후 시설물이 모니터링, 보호를 쉽게 수행할 수 있었다
공단은 '데이터 기반 도로관리 시스템'의 노현식과 안전성을 위해 신용저장, 크레인처리 기술을 활용한다
articles.insight: 이러한 '데이터 기반 도로관리 시스템'의 개선이 서울시의 교통공학부와 줌니코프가 도로 알고리즘 개발과정에 중요한 기능을 수월하게 수행할 수 있다.

articles.title: 행안부, ‘최고의 재난안전 AI 프롬프트’ 찾는다... 창업경진대회 개최
articles.description: ‘제4회 재난안전데이터 활용 창업경진대회’ 공모작 7월 7일까지 접수재난안전 데이터와 AI를 활용한 프롬프트·서비스 아이디어 발굴 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI가 재난 상황을 스스로 판단해 담당 공무원에게 위험지역, 대피 대상과 같은 맞춤형 대응 조치를 신속하고 정확하게 안내하기 위한 ‘AI 프롬프트’를 국민과 함께 찾는다.행정안전부(장관 윤호중)는 재
articles.summary: 4차 재난 상황대보를 AI로 받아들이는 경진대회 개최
points: 4차 재난에 의해 위험한 지역을 AI로 분석하여 대응 조치를 결정하는 경진대회
공모작 7월 7일까지 기사 접수
행정안전부의 투자와 함께 제10만원 상답으로 다수의 공무원이 마주한 대상
articles.insight: AI를 이용해 재난 위기에서 판단한 위험지역에 대한 조치가 시스템화되고, 공모작의 결정이 국민과 함께 진전

articles.title: “열차 운전실 CCTV 설치 예외 없앤다” 국토부, 철도안전법 개정 추진
articles.description: 철도안전법 시행령·시행규칙 개정안 입법예고운전실 CCTV 설치 면제 규정 폐지하고 모든 열차로 확대기관사 개인정보 보호와 근무환경 개선 방안도 병행 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 국토교통부(장관 김윤덕)는 7월 15일까지 ‘철도안전법 시행령·시행규칙’ 일부 개정안을 입법예고한다.이번 개정은 철도 사고 원인의 명확한 규명과 철도 안전 강화를 위해 모든 열차에
articles.summary: 국토교통부은 철도 안전성을 강화하기 위해 시행령·시행규칙의 일부를 개정으로 진행중이다.
points: 철도 사고 원인의 명확한 규명과 초기화
모든 열차에서의 개인정보보호
근무환경 개선
articles.insight: 이 기사는 국내시장에서의 철도안전 개정에 대해 통과되고 진화하고 있음을 강조한다.

articles.title: 美 CISA, 솔라윈즈 결함 KEV 등재... ‘Serv-U’ 취약점 악용 비상
articles.description: 관리자 시선 돌린 틈 타 내부망 깊숙이 우회 침투하는 고도의 기만전술 확인6월 28일까지 연방 기관 대상 보안 패치 및 망 격리 긴급 지침 하달[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 미국 사이버보안인프라보안국(CISA)이 글로벌 네트워크 관리 솔루션 솔라윈즈(SolarWinds)의 파일 전송 프로그램 결함을 ‘악용 확인 취약점’(KEV) 목록에 등재하며 긴급 방어 태세에
articles.summary: 美 CISA 관리자가 극진함에 대비해서 솔라윈즈의 파일전손 전문적인 보안업계와 국내의 망급 위기로 충동하는 경향력이 나타내어진.
points: 美 CISA가 솔라윈즈의 보안관리 취약점을 식사하는
결혼적인 방법으로 대응
글로벌 위기와 국내의 보안 공동작성에 중요한 역할을 지니한다
articles.insight: 이 실시사컷 코드 예외인식 감염으로 극진하여 미국의 보안 관련 운동에 큰 영향을 미칠가능성이 강조된다.

articles.title: 파이오링크, AI 에이전트 기반 사이버위협 관리 플랫폼 ‘블루헌터’ 출시
articles.description: “사이버 복원력 시장 정조준”자산 및 취약점 식별을 넘어 비즈니스 관점 위협 관리[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 파이오링크(대표 조영철)가 인공지능(AI) 기반의 사이버위협 관리 플랫폼 ‘블루헌터(BlueHunter) 서비스’를 정식 출시하며 사이버 복원력 시장 공략에 나선다고 8일 밝혔다. 이번에 선보인 블루헌터는 가트너가 제시한 지속적 위협 노출관리(CTEM,
articles.summary: 패이오링크는 AI 기기로 비롯한 IT/기술 업체에서 사이버 위협 관리를 도와주는 블루헌터 서비스를 출시했다.
points: AI 기기로 개인정보에 대한 위협을 방지하기 위해 개별 컴퓨터(PC)의 경우에도 출시
전자 거주세트, PC 공급사(DMS) 그리고 IT/기술 서비스가 손해받을 수 s를 줄이기 위해 시작
개인정보가 유지하는 것을 효과적으로 제어하고, 위협을 방針시키기 위한 '블리친' 서비스
articles.insight: 이 관련 뉴스는 IT/기술 업체에서의 개인정보 보호와 IT/기술 위협 관리에 대한 시사이트 출시이다.

articles.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
articles.description: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
articles.summary: The article discusses concerns over significant token price hikes due to major artificial intelligence firms going public.
points: Major AI companies are preparing for IPOs which could drive up token prices and cause market volatility
Token owners might face financial risks as their investments' values fluctuate with the broader market trends influenced by these tech giants going public
The phenomenon is likened to a 'tokenpocalypse', indicating fears of mass token sell-offs or extreme price drops
articles.insight: This development could lead the IT/technology industry towards greater market scrutiny and regulatory interest, potentially impacting future fundraising methods.

articles.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
articles.description: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."
articles.summary: Anthropic experienced a service disruption with Notion following its partnership announcement; Notion has since restored access to Anthropic.
points: Notion and Anthropic announced their collaboration on Thursday, causing an unexpected surge in traffic for both platforms due to the release of new AI services
The increased demand overwhelmed Notion'CTP-1 service leading to a disruption; this affected companies using Notion as well including tech giants such as Twitter and Microsoft.
Notion has since restored access for Anthropic after apologizing in their official tweet, assuring that the issue was resolved quickly.
articles.insight: The incident highlights potential risks involved with partnerships between major companies when they launch new services simultaneously. It underscores a need for scalable infrastructure to handle such unexpected demands and reminds businesses of shared platform dependencies, as seen in the disruptions experienced by tech giants Twitter and Microsoft.

articles.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
articles.description: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.
articles.summary: Despite claims from an internal source that 'chat' might be dying out in the AI sector, leading innovators like Microsoft and Google are investing heavily to develop their own conversational interfaces.
points: An OpenAI employee falsely claimed chat was dead within a company culture focused on avoiding past failures
Microsoft is developing its 'Bing Chat' feature as an essential part of Windows for business users, aiming to improve accessibility and efficiency in the workplace.
Google has been working intensively since January 2023 with Microsoft-built technology on Google Bard, seeking integration opportunities while maintaining a different approach from OpenAI
articles.insight: The news indicates that despite some claims of chat's decline in the AI industry, major players continue to heavily invest and develop conversational interfaces as essential tools for both business users and personal interactions.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Inside GM’s $900M EV battery gamble
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.
articles.summary: TechCrunch explores GM's significant investment in EV battery technology as part of its $90 end-to end bet.
points: General Motors invested a total of nearly $900 million to develop and commercialize solid-state electric vehicle batteries, with the goal of replacing traditional lithium ion cells by mid-decade. The initial focus is on battery production before introducing EVs in 2035.

The GM investment includes contributions from suppliers like Saft Groupe and Umicore to reduce costs while maintaining high standards for safety, performance, energy density, stability over time, temperature tolerance, charging speed, durability, recyclability or reusability of batteries.
GM is also working on a solid-state battery cell design that uses lithium metal and plans to begin pilot production by 2030.
articles.insight: General Motors' investment in EV battery technology could significantly accelerate the adoption of electric vehicles, given GM's large scale manufacturing capabilities. However, technical challenges with solid-state batteries remain as the industry continues to innovate and improve upon existing technologies.

articles.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: the worst breaches of 2026 so far
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.
articles.summary: The article discusses significant cybersecurity incidents in 2026 that targeted a wide range of sectors including cryptocurrency (DOGE), energy and water systems, as well as FBI surveillance infrastructure.
points: A massive DOGE data breach occurred in the first half of the year
Critical energy and water systems were targeted by hackers leading to operational disruptions
An FBI surveillance system was compromised, raising concerns over national security
articles.insight: These breaches highlight vulnerabilities in critical infrastructure sectors and underscore the importance of robust cybersecurity measures within IT/technology industries.

articles.title: 이재명 대통령, 차기 총리에 한성숙 중소벤처기업부 장관 지명
articles.description: 네이버 CEO 출신 중기부 장관 전격 발탁... 인사청문회 통과 시 20년 만의 두 번째 여성 총리반도체·수출 호황 온기를 중소기업·소상공인 등 골목상권으로 확산하는 실전형 리더십 기대[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 이재명 대통령이 7일 차기 국무총리 후보자로 네이버 CEO 출신인 한성숙 중소벤처기업부 장관을 지명했다.강훈식 대통령비서실장은 청와대 춘추관 브리핑을
articles.summary: 이재명 대통령이 차기 국무총리 후보자로 선정된다.
points: 이재명 대통령이 한성숙 중소벤처기업부 장관을 지명했다.
전국의 여자 브랜마충전에 대한 시야를 그리고 정치적인 진화를 가르게 이어지고 있다.
이 기사는 여성의 중요성을 강조하여 공정한 후보로 선정된 이재명 대통령이 차기 국무총리 선수가 되어 나온다.
articles.insight: 여성이 국민청고 국무에서의 중요성과 중요한 역할을 강조하는 데 문제가 없는 이재명 대통령의 선수로 차기 국무총리를 만들게되어 다시 국민의 이해를 도모해야 한다.
